applicationNotesForApplicant: Goal: a one-screen GTM cockpit that mixes sourced public signals (each row links out) with an illustrative funnel and demo-only ABM tiers—so it reads as product thinking, not fake insider data. Stack: static HTML/CSS/JS + JSON; host on GitHub Pages or Netlify. AI use: optional for polish; facts were checked against azx.io, KOMPAS VC, and GitHub. Next: wire HubSpot/Salesforce + RSS/news ingestion for live signals.
